title: Cooking
questions: Are you a good cook? Why/why not?
Which recipes do you cook most often?
What is your favourite kind of food to cook? Why?
Which meal (breakfast/lunch/dinner) do you enjoy cooking most?
Do you like cooking as a social activity?
Who do you like to cook with?
Are you interested in cooking food from other cultures? Which cultures and why?
What personal qualities and skills do you need to be a good cook, in your opinion?
Are you interested in cookery programmes or celebrity chefs? Which celebrity chefs do you recommend? Which do you not recommend?
Would you ever consider becoming a professional cook? What are the advantages and disadvantages of this profession?
What would your dream kitchen look like?
'Women are better cooks than men, simply because they are able to multitask!' Do you agree or disagree?
